For Catering Vendors

Grow your catering
business with Catery .

Showcase your catering services, packages, and menus in one place.

Join Egypt's catering marketplace and make it easier for customers to discover your business.

WHAT YOU GET

Everything you need to run your catering business

👤

Business Profile

Create your catering profile with your logo, photos, services, and more information.

📦

Service Packages

Create catering packages with pricing and details.

📅

Availability Management

Set your availability dates and manage booking requests.

📬

Booking Requests

Receive and manage customer requests in real time.

🌐

Business Visibility

Help customers discover your business more easily.

⚡

Easy Setup

Create your profile and get started in minutes.

See How It Works →
SIMPLE ONBOARDING

Start receiving bookings
in 3 simple steps

1

Create your profile

Add your business information, photos, and services.

2

Add Your Packages

Show customers what you offer and how you price your services.

3

Receive Requests

Start connecting with customers looking for catering services.
